title: IndusInd Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IndusInd Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
